  1. SFace -> best-match headtypecode
  2. basehead TSV -> baseline morph preset for that head
  3. MediaPipe landmarks on photo vs reference head PNG

  python tools/cranium_from_photo.py photo.jpg --export out.cranium --strength 0.8
